title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at PayU - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at PayU - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at PayU are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About PayU:
PayU is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PayU!
